summary: Iteration 30 - Save to Favorites Feature Testing. Backend API tests pass 100%. Frontend heart button toggle WORKS in PICKS panel. MyPets 'What Mira Knows' favorites section has UI rendering issue - section doesn't display despite API returning data correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Saved Favorites section not rendering in expanded 'What Mira Knows' card despite API returning 5 favorites for pet-3661ae55d2e2. The condition petFavorites[pet.id]?.length > 0 should be true but UI doesn't show the section.

action_items: Investigate why petFavorites state is not being populated in MyPets.jsx when 'What Mira Knows' is expanded - API returns data but UI doesn't display
Check if pet.id matches the petId used in fetchMiraKnowledge call
Verify token is being passed correctly to /api/favorites/{petId} endpoint in MyPets page
critical_code_review_comments: In MyPets.jsx line 1069, the favorites section is rendered based on petFavorites[pet.id]?.length > 0. The API returns data correctly but the React state may not be updating. Consider adding console.log to debug the petFavorites state after fetchMiraKnowledge completes.
The fetchMiraKnowledge function at line 105 fetches both knowledge and favorites in parallel. Verify the auth token is valid when this call is made.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend favorites API is fully functional - all 10 tests pass. Heart buttons in PersonalizedPicksPanel work correctly (found 8 buttons with title='Save to favorites'). Issue is in MyPets.jsx - the 'Saved Favorites' section in 'What Mira Knows' card doesn't render even though API returns 5 favorites. Debug the petFavorites React state.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Potential state management issue in MyPets.jsx - petFavorites state may not be updated correctly when fetchMiraKnowledge is called
reproduction_steps: 3. Switch to list view (click List icon)
4. Click on 'What Mira Knows About Mystique' card to expand
5. Observe that 'Saved Favorites' section is NOT shown despite API returning 5 favorites
mitigation_steps: Add console.log in fetchMiraKnowledge to verify favoritesRes.ok and favData
Check if pet.id (e.g., MongoDB _id) matches the petId format used in API calls
Verify token is correctly passed in Authorization header for both API calls
